calendar.description: Upcoming studio and family events. All times are Arizona time, no daylight saving.

event.title: Pool filter replacement
event.detail: Post summer service with Desert Pool Pros at the Grayhawk home.

event.title: Desert Vista staging install begins
event.detail: Install across three model homes in Marana with the Acacia Homes team and Brian Torres.

event.title: Monthly dinner party, fall harvest theme
event.detail: Ten guests on the Grayhawk patio, seasonal menu and wine pairings from the cellar.

event.title: Business insurance renewal
event.detail: Renewal updated for higher project values.

event.title: Diane arrives from New Jersey
event.detail: Week before Thanksgiving, departing November 24. Guest room refreshed ahead of the visit.

event.title: Host Thanksgiving dinner at home
event.detail: Family gathering at the Grayhawk home.

event.title: Final staging of the spec home
event.detail: DC Ranch flagship listing, ahead of the listing photography.

event.title: Dermatologist skin check
event.detail: Winter visit given the Arizona sun.

event.title: Palm Springs Modernism Week trip
event.detail: Mid century modern shows and home tours, returning February 22.
